name: flutterflow
description: Agentic building with FlutterFlow. Auto-installs the FlutterFlow CLI (handles a missing Dart SDK gracefully) and provides a guided orient → validate → apply workflow over `flutterflow ai`.

api_token.title: FlutterFlow API token
api_token.description: Create one at https://app.flutterflow.io/account. Used as FF_API_KEY to authenticate `flutterflow ai`. Stored securely by Claude Code and provided to the CLI environment — never committed to a repo.
